title: More Composting
description: Fully configure what you can compost.
body:
# MoreComposting Fully configure what you can compost!
Comes pre-configured with what I think should be compostable.
**This project has been merged into [Vanilla Tweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-tweaker)**
### Config ***config change requires restart*** **Add / Replace**
• namespace:path chance%
• ex: "minecraft:rotten_flesh 10%" **Remove**
• -namespace:path
• ex: "-minecraft:apple" [Discord](https://discord.gg/rWkXF7pbmG)
